key_decisions.original_text: Glamsterdam devnet-5 abandoned; devnet-6 relaunch on Wednesday with same spec
EIP-7688 (stable containers) deferred until EPBS devnet stable for at least a weekend; targeting devnet-8
key_decisions.context: deferred until EPBS devnet stable for at least a weekend

key_decisions.original_text: EIP-7997: Option 2 adopted — enshrine Arachnid at known address in Genesis; EIP or 7997 modification to follow
key_decisions.context: Option 2 adopted — enshrine Arachnid at known address in Genesis

key_decisions.original_text: Breakout rooms split: EL on deployment/8037 topics, CL on range sync and EPBS issues
